items.notes: Version numbers follow Cisco NX-OS 7k/9k nomenclature. Latest is the most recent generally available; recommended balances stability and features; EOL list includes releases no longer receiving updates. Verify against Cisco official documentation and CCO for exact GA/EOL dates and platform-specific availability.

Versions are for common universal IOS-XE train used on many Catalyst and ISR platforms. Specific hardware may have different trains and dates; always verify compatibility and support contracts. Recommended is a broadly stable, tested release; latest includes newest features but may be newer on some platforms.

Versions are for Cisco Catalyst 9800 Series Wireless LAN Controllers. Confirm exact latest recommended version on Cisco.com CCO and your specific model/feature licenses; consider device-specific compatibility and support contracts.

Version numbers reflect PAN-OS major.minor.patch; patch releases (e.g., 10.2.3, 10.2.4) are treated as latest/recommended. Confirm exact build numbers on the official Palo Alto support site and end-of-life timelines in the EOL policy as they vary by release date.
